title: bilabrella rehmannii
intro: Bilabrella rehmannii, also known as African bird's eye or African pygmy tear, is a plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bilabrella rehmannii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as being used to boost the immune system. Bilabrella rehmannii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
